title: AMLA advisory note on money-laundering risks as MiCAR transitional period ends
summary: AMLA published its first advisory note on ML/TF risks tied to the end of the MiCAR transitional period on 1 July 2026.
so_what: CASPs must demonstrate robust AML controls before the transition deadline.
action: Review crypto onboarding and transaction monitoring before 1 July 2026.

title: EBA publishes final draft RTS on liquidity reporting under CRR3
summary: EBA finalised the RTS on liquidity reporting templates under CRR3.
so_what: Banks must update COREP reporting pipelines to the new templates.
action: Map new templates to internal reporting systems by Q4 2026.

title: Wise under investigation by regulators over AML control weaknesses
summary: Wise faces a regulatory probe over alleged weaknesses in its anti-money-laundering controls.
so_what: Signals heightened supervisory scrutiny of payment institutions' AML frameworks.
action: Benchmark PI client AML programmes against emerging supervisory expectations.

title: ESMA issues guidelines on MiCA stablecoin reserve requirements
summary: ESMA clarified reserve composition and segregation rules for stablecoin issuers under MiCA.
so_what: Stablecoin issuers must align reserve management with the clarified expectations.
action: Review reserve attestation processes against the new guidance.

title: FSMA consults on updated MiFID II suitability circular
summary: FSMA opened a consultation on its updated suitability assessment circular for Belgian investment firms.
so_what: Belgian investment firms should prepare to respond and adapt suitability processes.
action: Submit consultation feedback before the closing date.

title: ECB Banking Supervision sets 2026 SREP priorities on ICT and operational resilience
summary: The ECB flagged ICT risk and operational resilience as 2026 SREP focus areas.
so_what: Banks should expect deeper DORA-related supervisory questions in 2026.
action: Pre-empt SREP by reviewing DORA implementation gaps.

title: EIOPA consults on Solvency II review reporting templates
summary: EIOPA opened a consultation on revised reporting templates under the Solvency II review.
so_what: Insurers must prepare for revised quantitative reporting.
action: Assess template changes against current reporting capability.

title: ESMA updates EMIR Refit Q&A on reporting fields
summary: ESMA clarified several EMIR Refit reporting fields in an updated Q&A.
